meaning: n.阿尔及尔(阿尔及利亚首都)
examples: His abhorrence of racism led him to write "The Algiers Motel Incident."
The same Negroes plied the shovel and sang. Old Big Slim Hazard had once worked on the Algiers ferry as a deckhand.
His mute and illiterate mother, and her extended family, raised her two sons in a small flat in Algiers with neither a lavatory nor running water.
Fischer Elementary and the surrounding neighborhood of Algiers was not heavily damaged by the storm.
Senior French, British and American diplomats have travelled to Algiers in recent weeks to complain.
